Footer.tagline: The Precision Concierge Architecture for hospitality leaders.

Landing.heroTitle: Qrixa: Powerful Menu Ordering & Table Management
Landing.heroDescription: Seamlessly manage orders, tables, and branches across multiple currencies with our intuitive SaaS platform.
Landing.valueTitle: Designed for Growth. Built for Precision.
Landing.valueDescription: Everything you need to orchestrate a world-class dining experience.
Landing.multiBranchText: Centralize operations across cities with one clean dashboard.
Landing.tableOrderingText: Sync table-side orders with kitchen displays instantly.
Landing.multiCurrencyText: Process payments and reporting in local currencies automatically.
Landing.analyticsText: Understand peak hours, top items, and service performance.
Landing.kitchenTitle: The Precision Concierge for Your Kitchen.
Landing.quote: Qrixa transformed our workflow in the first week. We've seen a 22% increase in table turnover.

points.queueText: Automated load balancing between kitchen stations to prevent bottlenecks.
points.menuText: Update prices or disable items instantly across all digital platforms and physical QR menus.
points.staffText: Identify your top performers and optimize scheduling based on real-world order velocity.

Landing.ctaTitle: Ready to scale your restaurant business?
Landing.ctaDescription: Join high-performing restaurants using Qrixa to streamline operations.

SignupSection.title: Start your digital menu in minutes
SignupSection.description: Create an owner account, verify your email, and publish your menu with a modern dashboard built for restaurants and cafes.
SignupSection.verificationNote: Email verification protects your account before dashboard access.
SignupSection.formDescription: Use your business details and get an instant verification email.

SignupForm.verificationRequired: Email verification is required for sign in. Keep your inbox handy.
SignupForm.termsAgreement: I agree to the terms and understand sign-in requires email verification.
SignupForm.footerNote: By creating an account, you will receive a verification email.

errors.completeFields: Please complete the required fields and confirm your password.
errors.strongerPassword: Choose a stronger password (at least fair).

toasts.checkInbox: Check your inbox to verify your account.

success.verifyDescription: We sent a verification link to
success.verifyAfter: After you verify, you can sign in.

AboutV2.heroTitle: We are on a mission to modernize restaurant operations.
AboutV2.heroDescription: Precision concierge architecture designed for the high-stakes world of multi-unit hospitality.
AboutV2.precisionText: Architecture that anticipates demand before it happens.
AboutV2.originLead: Qrixa was born in the chaos of the kitchen and the spreadsheets of the back office.
AboutV2.originParagraph1: Restaurant groups needed more than tools. They needed one architectural layer to sync procurement, staffing, and floor management across every branch.
AboutV2.originParagraph2: Today, Qrixa powers ambitious restaurant operations, turning friction into a seamless guest experience.
AboutV2.contactDescription: Whether you are scaling your third branch or managing fifty, our team is ready to assist.

form.messagePlaceholder: How can we help optimize your operations?
form.privacyNote: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy.

PricingV2.heroTitle: Simple Pricing for Any Restaurant Size.
PricingV2.heroDescription: From local bistros to global hospitality chains, Qrixa provides the precision your operations demand. No hidden fees.

professional.subtitle: For growing businesses scaling across multiple locations.

PricingV2.faqAnswer: Qrixa keeps pricing transparent and supports scale paths as your business grows.

faq.question2: Can I add more branches to Professional later?
faq.question3: Is there a setup fee for new accounts?

PricingV2.ctaDescription: Join 1,200+ restaurants scaling with Qrixa today.

SolutionsV2.heroDescription: Qrixa provides the architectural foundation for global hospitality groups. Manage complexity with elegance.
SolutionsV2.multiBranchDescription: Manage all your locations from a single dashboard with real-time performance aggregation and staff synchronization.
SolutionsV2.globalReadyDescription: Multi-currency support for international operations with localized pricing and reporting.
SolutionsV2.tableManagementDescription: Optimize your floor plan with real-time table status and digital ordering.
SolutionsV2.implementationDescription: Scaling your restaurant group is a process of refinement, not friction.

steps.connectDescription: Plug in your existing systems and unify your data.
steps.configureDescription: Define regional rules and deploy standards globally.
steps.scaleDescription: Launch locations faster using proven architecture.

SolutionsV2.finalCtaDescription: Join 500+ global restaurant groups using Qrixa.
